subject: Gaming
title: Blizzard and the Hong Kong Controversy
description: A short lesson to help you apply Blizzard and the Hong Kong Controversy.

hook.text: Blizzard banned a Hearthstone pro player for supporting Hong Kong protests. Gamers worldwide erupted in outrage.

buildup.text: In 2019, Blitzchung voiced support for Hong Kong protesters during a Hearthstone tournament interview.

discovery.text: Blizzard banned him for a year and took his prize money. The punishment felt disproportionate and politically motivated.

twist.text: Blizzard reduced the punishment after backlash but never fully addressed the political motivations behind their decision.

climax.text: The incident exposed how gaming companies balance free speech against their business interests in China.

punchline.text: Free speech vs Chinese market access. The player paid the price.

quiz.question: Why did the Blizzard-Hong Kong controversy matter to the gaming community?
options: It exposed how companies balance free speech against Chinese market access
It was only about Hearthstone strategy
